creator: santhosh.raju@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 198494
Patch to upgrade the ports script to support din-38 builds.

DIN Is Noise has been updated from version 37a to version 38.

I have made a patch that makes changes to the ports script to support building din-38.

It would be nice if the patch can be applied to the ports tree of FreeBSD.

Thank you
Santhosh
